usage: assignBump [-help] [-constraint_file <string>] [-exclude_region <llx lly urx ury ...>] [-maxDistance <integer>] [-multiBumpToMultiPad] [{[-pgnet <pgnetList> | -exclude_pgnet <exclude_pgnetList>] [-pginst <pginstList>]} [-pgonly ]] [{-area <llx lly urx ury> | -selected }]

options.name: -area
options.description: assign bump in the specified area

options.name: -constraint_file
options.description: path name to the file to load bump assignment constraints from

options.name: -exclude_pgnet
options.description: PG net not to assign ((net)*, optional)

options.name: -exclude_region
options.description: assign bump out of the specified area

options.name: -maxDistance
options.description: the maximum distance, in microns,to look for bump connection

options.name: -multiBumpToMultiPad
options.description: multiple bump to assign multiple pad
